name: log
description: Read from or write to a log file

message.description: Log message to write (required for write)

level.description: Log level, e.g. INFO, WARN, ERROR (optional, write only, default INFO)

count.description: Number of recent lines to read (optional, read only, default 100)

filter.description: Substring filter for read results (optional, read only)

operation.description: Operation to perform: read or write
